80.3 - Services That Would Not Be Covered as Inpatient Services 
(Rev. 1, 10-01-03) 
A3-3125C, HHA-230.C 

Services that would not be covered if furnished as inpatient hospital services are excluded 
from home health coverage. 

80.4 - Housekeeping Services 
(Rev. 1, 10-01-03) 
A3-3125D, HHA-230D
